extracted_by: HivemindMinion (Claude Code) from HivemindOverlord's licensed PoE2 install

ascendancies.note: ids are reliable; display_name is best-effort heuristic (see metadata.json caveats)

stats.blocker: no current extractor; needs writing against current stats.datc64 layout (~110KB, 26943 stat definitions loaded by support_gems extractor as side-effect)
stats.interim_via_side_effect: support_gems extractor loads 26943 stat IDs from stats.datc64 as a side-effect; could repurpose into a standalone stats extractor

skill_gems.blocker: extractor sources from PoB2 which hasn't shipped 0.5 tree.json yet (see CLAUDE.md Data Status)

data_policy: All data here is extracted exclusively from the maintainer's licensed PoE2 install via the in-repo extraction pipeline. No third-party wiki / scraped data is bundled. See data/game/README.md for the full policy.
